response_text: Vegetables are tasty and good for you!
Too much meat isn't good for you but so delish!
Cold dipped in hummus, oh so good!
Steamed and dipped in butter, amazing!
Stuffed or sliced and served with pasta, yum!
Pulled or shredded. It's all good!
Fried or grilled in a salad. Love it!
Sweet, tart and everything in between!
Delicious and comes in its own comedic prop!
Green or red. Even better fermented ;-)!
